summary: Short factual summary of what changed in this phase.
known_gaps: List any deferred work or unresolved risks.

patch_dispositions.note: Required when this packet resubmits after a PATCH_REQUIRED. One entry per patch_targets[i] from the prior decision. disposition is 'applied' (must correspond to a real diff at the cited file:line) or 'disputed' (must include a rebuttal and be reflected in known_gaps).
